name: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals
confidenceReason: Monopolistic drug franchises (Dupixent, EYLEA HD) with one of the best R&D engines in pharma. 5-year avg ROIC of 28%. Forward P/E ~17x with 0.40 beta provides defensive ballast.
bullCase: Dupixent sales surging 32% with multiple label expansions pending. EYLEA HD gaining market share rapidly. At least 4 expected FDA approvals in the next year. Ultra-low beta (0.40) provides portfolio ballast. Aggressive share buybacks enhance EPS.
bearCase: If Eylea biosimilar competition intensifies beyond expectations, the cash cow suffers. Drug pricing regulation in the US remains a perennial risk. Post-Dupixent growth story is unclear.
